activity_summary: A customer success manager reviews renewal risk and decides save plan, executive escalation, or wait for usage evidence.

verification_checklist: Run npm test
Run npm run capture:model-ui:screenshots
feature render paths must not emit raw input, select, textarea, or checkbox markup outside approved helpers
new primitives or variants require updating the repo-local contract first
generated UI must include a local check command or equivalent static inspection
gpt55-xhigh-codex-with-judgmentkit desktop screenshot has a styled primary work surface
gpt55-xhigh-codex-with-judgmentkit mobile screenshot keeps the decision and handoff visible
desktop viewport screenshot
mobile viewport screenshot
keyboard focus check for interactive controls
overflow check for long labels, descriptions, and values
modal or dialog footer order check when dialogs are present
disabled, empty, error, and ready state review
Verify state: selected work item is visible
Verify state: decision evidence is scannable
Verify state: primary action and handoff reason are clear
Verify required state: empty
Verify required state: ready
Verify required state: loading
Verify required state: error
Verify required state: disabled
Verify required state: focus-visible

command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: A renewal risk review surface helps the customer success manager choose the next action and prepare a handoff for Northstar Labs.
parsed.css: :root{color-scheme:light;--bg:#f4f6f8;--surface:#fff;--surface-strong:#f9fbfc;--ink:#18212f;--muted:#5f6b7a;--line:#dbe2ea;--line-strong:#b9c6d3;--accent:#0f766e;--accent-strong:#0b5f59;--accent-soft:#dff5f1;--warn:#a45b13;--warn-soft:#fff1dc;--danger:#9d2d22;--danger-soft:#fde8e5;--good:#217346;--good-soft:#e5f5eb;--shadow:0 18px 44px rgba(24,33,47,.08)}*{box-sizing:border-box}body{margin:0;min-width:320px;background:var(--bg);color:var(--ink);font-family:Inter,ui-sans-serif,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;line-height:1.45}button{font:inherit}.renewal-risk-app{min-height:100vh;padding:24px;display:grid;grid-template-rows:auto 1fr;gap:16px}.topbar{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:20px;max-width:1280px;width:100%;margin:0 auto}.title-block h1{margin:0;font-size:24px;line-height:1.2;font-weight:760;letter-spacing:0}.title-block p{margin:6px 0 0;color:var(--muted);max-width:720px;font-size:14px}.meeting-badge{flex:0 0 auto;border:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--surface);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;min-width:210px;box-shadow:var(--shadow)}.meeting-badge span{display:block;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em}.meeting-badge strong{display:block;margin-top:2px;font-size:14px}.workspace-grid{max-width:1280px;width:100%;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(230px,270px) minmax(420px,1fr) minmax(330px,380px);gap:16px;align-items:start}.panel{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;box-shadow:var(--shadow)}.stacked-panel{margin-top:16px}.panel-header{padding:14px 16px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}.panel-header h2{margin:0;font-size:15px;line-height:1.25;font-weight:760}.panel-header p{margin:4px 0 0;color:var(--muted);font-size:13px}.panel-body{padding:14px 16px 16px}.queue-list{display:grid;gap:10px;padding:14px}.queue-item{width:100%;min-height:78px;border:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--surface-strong);border-radius:8px;padding:11px 12px;text-align:left;cursor:pointer;display:grid;gap:6px;color:var(--ink)}.queue-item:hover{border-color:var(--line-strong);background:#fff}.queue-item.is-active{border-color:var(--accent);background:var(--accent-soft)}.queue-kicker{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;font-weight:700}.queue-name{font-size:14px;font-weight:760;overflow-wrap:anywhere}.queue-meta{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px}.status-pill,.state-chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;min-height:24px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--surface-strong);color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;white-space:normal}.status-pill.warn,.state-chip.warn{color:var(--warn);background:var(--warn-soft);border-color:#f3c780}.status-pill.danger,.state-chip.danger{color:var(--danger);background:var(--danger-soft);border-color:#f2b5ad}.status-pill.good,.state-chip.good{color:var(--good);background:var(--good-soft);border-color:#abd8bb}.account-summary{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr));border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}.summary-item{padding:14px 16px;border-right:1px solid var(--line);min-width:0}.summary-item:last-child{border-right:0}.summary-label{display:block;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em}.summary-value{display:block;margin-top:4px;font-size:15px;font-weight:760;overflow-wrap:anywhere}.evidence-stack{display:grid;gap:12px}.evidence-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:132px 1fr;gap:12px;align-items:start;padding:12px;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;background:var(--surface-strong)}.evidence-label{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:760;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em}.evidence-text{margin:0;font-size:14px;overflow-wrap:anywhere}.policy-note{border-left:4px solid var(--accent);background:var(--accent-soft);padding:12px 14px;border-radius:6px;color:#173f3b;font-size:14px}.policy-note p{margin:0}.decision-stack{display:grid;gap:12px}.decision-button{width:100%;min-height:58px;border:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--surface-strong);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;text-align:left;cursor:pointer;color:var(--ink)}.decision-button strong{display:block;font-size:14px}.decision-button span{display:block;margin-top:3px;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;line-height:1.35}.decision-button:hover{border-color:var(--line-strong);background:#fff}.decision-button.is-recommended{border-color:var(--accent);background:var(--accent-soft)}.decision-button[disabled]{cursor:not-allowed;opacity:.58}.handoff-grid{display:grid;gap:10px}.handoff-item{display:grid;gap:3px;padding:10px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}.handoff-item:last-child{border-bottom:0}.handoff-label{color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;font-weight:760;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em}.handoff-value{font-size:14px;font-weight:650;overflow-wrap:anywhere}.action-row{display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:14px}.primary-action,.secondary-action{min-height:42px;border-radius:8px;padding:9px 12px;font-weight:760;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid transparent}.primary-action{color:#fff;background:var(--accent);border-color:var(--accent-strong)}.primary-action:hover{background:var(--accent-strong)}.primary-action[disabled]{cursor:not-allowed;background:#a7b4bf;border-color:#91a0ad}.secondary-action{color:var(--ink);background:var(--surface);border-color:var(--line-strong)}.reason-text{margin:8px 0 0;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px}.review-states{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:8px;margin-top:12px}.state-card{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;padding:9px 10px;background:var(--surface-strong);min-height:62px}.state-card strong{display:block;font-size:12px}.state-card span{display:block;margin-top:3px;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;line-height:1.3;overflow-wrap:anywhere}.state-card[data-state='ready']{border-color:#abd8bb;background:var(--good-soft)}.state-card[data-state='error']{border-color:#f2b5ad;background:var(--danger-soft)}.state-card[data-state='loading']{border-color:#c9d5df;background:#f6f8fb}.state-card[data-state='empty']{border-color:var(--line);background:#fff}button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid rgba(15,118,110,.38);outline-offset:3px}@media (max-width:1120px){.workspace-grid{grid-template-columns:minmax(220px,260px) minmax(360px,1fr)}.decision-column{grid-column:1/-1}}@media (max-width:780px){.renewal-risk-app{padding:14px}.topbar,.workspace-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr}.meeting-badge{min-width:0}.account-summary,.review-states{grid-template-columns:1fr}.summary-item{border-right:0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}.summary-item:last-child{border-bottom:0}.evidence-row{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:6px}.action-row{display:grid}.primary-action,.secondary-action{width:100%}}
parsed.html:
Renewal risk review

Review at-risk renewals before the weekly account meeting, then choose the next owner, action, risk reason, and evidence gap.

Weekly account meetingDecision due today

Renewal queue

Choose the active renewal account.

Selected account

Northstar Labs needs a clear renewal handoff before the account planning meeting.

AccountNorthstar Labs
PlanEnterprise annual
Renewal value$84K ARR
Current riskChampion change

Risk evidence

Use account facts and customer language to decide the next move.

Usage trend

Usage dropped 28 percent over the last two reporting periods.

Champion change

Primary champion left the account last month; sponsor coverage is not yet confirmed.

Evidence gap

Procurement timeline is missing before escalation or a committed save plan.

Renewal policy

Use policy guidance to choose between escalation, save plan, or waiting for stronger evidence.

Executive escalation is appropriate when sponsor risk and renewal timing are clear. Resolve missing procurement dates before committing a save plan.

Decision path

Recommended next move: request the procurement date, then decide whether escalation or a save plan is warranted.

Renewal handoff

Draft the handoff the customer success team will receive.

Next ownerCustomer success manager
Next actionRequest the procurement date before committing the save plan.
Risk reasonChampion changed and usage dropped 28 percent.
Evidence gapProcurement timeline is missing.

Send handoff is disabled until the procurement date request is recorded.

Review status

Current readiness for this account.

ReadySelected work item and risk evidence are visible.
Needs correctionProcurement timing is missing from the handoff.
LoadingOwner coverage can be confirmed after the date request.
EmptyNo save plan has been started for this account.
